name: Clywedog Reservoir & Bryntail Mines
highlights: Soaring concrete dam, Glyndŵr's Way ridge and haunting lead-mine ruins.
points_of_interest: Bryntail Lead Mine (Cadw ruins); Clywedog dam (highest in UK when built 1967)
water_features: Llyn Clywedog; River Severn below dam
picnic_spots: Fan car park lakeside picnic tables
parking_start: Bryntail Mine or Fan car park (both free)
food_drink_nearby: Great Oak Café Llanidloes; Red Lion Llanidloes
hazards_notes: Mine workings fenced off — stay on paths; wind on dam
